summary: Planned Phase 1 (Graph Foundation) of the Unified Knowledge Graph — 12 tasks covering package scaffold, type system, GraphStore with LokiJS persistence, VectorStore with cosine similarity, ContextQL with BFS traversal and noise pruning, CodeIngestor with regex-based TypeScript parsing, TopologicalLinker with cycle detection, and end-to-end integration tests.
pending: Task 11: Integration test — scan and query end-to-end
Task 12: Run full test suite and build
concerns: LokiJS types may need @types/lokijs or manual declarations
Regex-based parsing is intentionally limited — tree-sitter upgrade planned for later
VectorStore starts with brute-force cosine similarity — HNSWLib integration deferred to Phase 2+
decisions: Start with regex parsing, not tree-sitter (reduce native dependency risk in Phase 1)
Start with brute-force vector search, not HNSWLib (prove the interface before optimizing)
Graph types live in packages/graph, not packages/types (graph-specific, not shared foundation)
JSON persistence first, Protobuf deferred to when graph size requires it
